final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial illustration of a dreamy underwater fairytale world with a mermaid.

Style/medium: dreamy fairytale illustration, whimsical storybook aesthetic with soft painterly textures
Composition: wide underwater scene, eye-level perspective with upward view toward surface, balanced depth layers
Subject: mermaid gracefully swimming among coral reefs, ethereal and elegant, surrounded by bioluminescent jellyfish
Scene/backdrop: vibrant coral reef formations, sunken shipwreck with scattered treasure, deep ocean environment with light rays penetrating from surface
Lighting/mood: dappled sunlight streaming through water from above, soft volumetric rays, magical and dreamlike atmosphere
Color palette: iridescent blues and teals as base, warm coral pinks and oranges as accent, golden light rays, bioluminescent cyan glows
Materials/textures: soft watercolor-like blending, subtle grain, flowing fabric-like mermaid tail, translucent jellyfish bodies
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, harsh shadows, cluttered composition, generic stock illustration style, deformed anatomy
